statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1010 — Layer 4 続き: 確率論基礎 (BorelCantelli / Distributions / 法則)
  藤本伸樹 + Claude Opus 4.7 — 2026-04-28

  Demonstrates Mathlib v4.27 probability foundations in the Rei-AIOS
  project. Builds on STEP 1008 MeasureTheory.lean and STEP 1009
  ConditionalProbability.lean.

  Topics:
    §1. Bernoulli distribution (discrete, finite parameterization)
    §2. Binomial distribution via combinatorics
    §3. Geometric distribution
    §4. Borel-Cantelli — statement + concrete consequence
    §5. Weak Law of Large Numbers — statement (finite case)
    §6. Concrete probability calculations (CV (Chebyshe
